summary: Iteration 145: Subscription Page, Onboarding Wizard, Employee→User Auto-Creation - All tests PASSED (18/18 backend, 10/10 frontend)
critical_code_review_comments: Subscription API correctly returns plan details, usage stats, and available_plans
Downgrade protection working - can't downgrade to plan with lower limits than current usage
Employee→User auto-creation working - POST /api/employees with email auto-creates user account
Onboarding wizard correctly creates branch, employee, and tax settings in 3 steps
New tenant registration creates tenant with onboarding_completed=false and starter plan
Tenant data isolation working - new tenants see empty branches/sales (0 items)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test tenants/employees created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 145: Subscription management, Onboarding wizard, and Employee→User auto-creation all verified working. Subscription page at /subscription shows current plan, usage stats (users/branches/employees), and 3 plan cards (Starter/Business/Enterprise) with switch/contact sales buttons. Onboarding wizard at /onboarding has 3 steps (Branch→Employee→Tax) with skip/back navigation. New tenant registration flow creates tenant with onboarding_completed=false. Employee with email auto-creates user account with default password 'emp@123'.

backend_pytest: test_downgrade_protection - PASS (can't downgrade with more branches than allowed)
test_update_onboarding_profile - PASS (can update city, phone, industry)
frontend_playwright: Current plan card shows Enterprise Plan - PASS
Usage stats cards (13 users, 6 branches, 3 employees) - PASS
Platform Admin link in sidebar - PASS
Skip and Back navigation buttons - PASS

subscription_api.downgrade_protection: Working - can't downgrade below current usage limits

employee_user_autocreation.behavior: POST /api/employees with email field auto-creates user account with password 'emp@123'

tenant_data_isolation.behavior: New tenant sees empty branches, sales, and starts on starter plan
